subject: Astronomy & Space
title: The Hubble Tension
description: A quick win: understand The Hubble Tension.

hook.text: Two methods of measuring how fast the universe expands give different answers. Both can't be right.

buildup.text: Measuring nearby supernovae gives one rate. The Cosmic Microwave Background gives another. The gap won't close.

discovery.text: The disagreement is called the Hubble Tension. It's been confirmed by multiple teams using independent methods.

twist.text: If the tension is real, it may mean our model of the universe is incomplete—new physics could be hiding in the gap.

climax.text: JWST and next-generation surveys are refining measurements. The answer could reshape cosmology entirely.

punchline.text: Two numbers that should match but don't. A crack in our cosmic model.

quiz.question: What is the Hubble Tension?
options: A disagreement between two methods of measuring the universe's expansion rate
The tension between dark matter and dark energy in galaxy clusters
The gravitational pull between the Milky Way and Andromeda
